why: Index must reflect the latest content after edits

output.console: Index update result with entry count and duration

error_handling.action: Log as warning, the edit is persisted to file but search may return stale metadata until next full index rebuild

event.message: Index update failed after editing entry {entry_id}

decisions.reason: Direct DB UPDATE instead of full index rebuild
decisions.rationale: Running the full knowledge-index-build flow after every edit is too slow. A targeted UPDATE is sufficient and fast.
